notes: Section 221, R.S. § 4856; , ; , ; , , related to discharge of insane patients on bond.June 25, 1936, ch. 80449 Stat. 1921June 25, 1948, ch. 646, § 32(b)62 Stat. 991May 24, 1949, ch. 139, § 12763 Stat. 107
Section 222, R.S. § 4857, provided that no insane person not charged with any breach of the peace should ever be confined in the United States jail in the District of Columbia.
Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Oct. 1, 1987section 12(b) of Pub. L. 98–621section 225 of this title
